chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5905 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Idrees Alvi, Advocate for the petitioner Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Abdul Jalil A. Zubedi, AAG alongwith PI Nadeem Jamal, SIU/CIA and SIP Sohrab, PS Orangi, District West ---------------------- SIP, PS Sohrab Goth files statement alongwith set of documents, as well as statement of the petitioner and alleged missing person. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that missing person has been surfaced, therefore, under instructions he does not press instant petition. Learned Assistant Attorney General as well as learned AAG record their no objection. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
